name: ollama-offline-agent
description: Offline autonomous coding agent using a local Ollama server.

commands.title: Ollama Offline Agent: Stop Current Run
Ollama Offline Agent: Check Local Ollama
Ollama Offline Agent: Select Installed Model
Ollama Offline Agent: Open Local Skills Folder
Ollama Offline Agent: Clear Chat History
Ollama Offline Agent: Open Chat in Editor
Ollama Offline Agent: Open in Secondary Side Bar…

ollamaOffline.model.description: Locally installed Ollama model used by the agent. Empty selects the first locally installed model.

ollamaOffline.language.description: Preferred language for agent replies. Auto follows the language of the newest user message; the UI initially reflects the VS Code language.

ollamaOffline.temperature.description: Sampling temperature for the local model.

ollamaOffline.contextWindow.description: Ollama num_ctx value. 0 uses the model/Ollama default.

ollamaOffline.maxSteps.description: Maximum model/tool turns per task. 0 means no step limit.

ollamaOffline.commandTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum duration of one agent shell command. 0 means no timeout; Stop always cancels it.

enumDescriptions: Agent can access only the open workspace.
Agent can inspect the system and work outside the workspace; every write and command remains individually approved and critical paths are blocked.
Agent can work anywhere accessible to the current Windows user, including local application installs. Every write and command still requires approval; destructive commands remain blocked.

ollamaOffline.protectedPaths.description: System paths that the agent may inspect but may not write. Use * for one path segment.
